core.title: Modern AI Website Development
core.tagline: Intelligent websites that think and adapt
core.description: Full-stack web applications integrating RAG-powered search, conversational AI chatbots, smart content personalization, and real-time data features. Engineered for performance, accessibility, and scalable deployment on cloud infrastructure.
core.detail: Whether you need a portfolio, SaaS platform, or enterprise portal, everything from UI design to API integration and deployment is covered — shipping production-ready products that impress users and perform at scale.

core.title: App Development
core.tagline: Cross-platform apps built for the real world
core.description: Mobile and progressive web applications using React Native and Next.js with cloud-native backends. Clean, maintainable codebases with solid authentication, real-time sync, push notifications, and offline support baked in from day one.
core.detail: Apps built with the end user in mind — fast, intuitive, and rock-solid across iOS, Android, and web. Whether a startup MVP or a feature extension, shipping apps that feel native and work reliably.

core.title: AI Automation & Pipeline Engineering
core.tagline: From raw data to decisions — automated
core.description: End-to-end machine learning pipelines that ingest, clean, transform, and serve data at scale. From scheduled ETL workflows to real-time streaming pipelines, eliminating manual processes and creating systems that run autonomously.
core.detail: Using tools like Apache Airflow, LangChain, and FastAPI, architecting robust automation systems that integrate with existing stacks and scale without friction. Pipelines built for financial analytics, media monitoring, and computer vision data flows.

core.title: AI Agents
core.tagline: Autonomous systems that reason and execute
core.description: AI agents capable of multi-step reasoning, tool use, and autonomous task execution. Not simple chatbots — intelligent systems that can research, plan, make decisions, and interact with APIs, databases, and external services autonomously.
core.detail: Applications include customer support automation, research assistants, operations bots, and complex workflow orchestration. Agents built with safety guardrails, observability, and fallback logic for reliable production performance.

core.title: Data Analytics & Visualization
core.tagline: Turn raw numbers into clear strategy
core.description: Transforming messy, siloed data into clean, interactive intelligence — building dashboards, reporting pipelines, and predictive models that surface the insights businesses need to act faster and smarter.
core.detail: Analytics work covers exploratory data analysis, statistical modelling, KPI dashboards, and ML-based forecasting. Findings presented clearly — whether for executives, engineers, or investors — ensuring insight drives action.

core.title: Computer Vision Solutions
core.tagline: Teaching machines to see and understand
core.description: Real-time image recognition, object detection, video analysis, and facial recognition systems using state-of-the-art deep learning architectures. CV systems optimized for both research accuracy and production-grade latency.
core.detail: From YOLO-based detection pipelines to custom CNN classifiers trained on domain data, delivering CV solutions that work reliably in real conditions. Use cases include security surveillance, quality inspection, sports analytics, and medical imaging.

additional.title: Social Media Influencer Management
additional.description: Strategy, scheduling, analytics, brand partnerships, and cross-platform growth for content creators and influencers.

additional.title: Artist Management
additional.description: Digital presence setup, release planning, playlist pitching, booking support, and online brand development for musicians and performers.

additional.title: Tech Support for Social Platforms
additional.description: Troubleshooting, account recovery, monetisation setup, and platform optimisation for creators managing complex multi-channel presence.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: Align on goals, constraints, timeline, and the data landscape. Ask the right questions upfront so nothing gets rebuilt later.

process.title: Architecture
process.description: Design the system blueprint — choosing the right stack, infrastructure, and AI models for specific requirements and scale.

process.title: Build
process.description: Iterative development with regular checkpoints. Progress is visible early and often — no big reveal at the end.

process.title: Deploy
process.description: Production-ready launch with monitoring, error tracking, and documentation so you can operate confidently from day one.

process.title: Iterate
process.description: Post-launch optimisation, feature additions, and ongoing support. Good software evolves — staying engaged as systems grow.

guarantees: Full IP ownership transferred to you
